CablesStep1.title: Laying cables
CablesStep1.description: Go back to the [color=PURPLE]Power[/color] menu within the [color=PURPLE]Building[/color] menu.

CablesStep2.description: Select the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Power Cable[/color] button and place this between any [color=RED]red[/color] connecting [color=KHAKI]Power Cables[/color]. You can press [color=PURPLE]Continue[/color] once satisfied.
